name: EchoStar CORP
summary: EchoStar Corporation is a Nevada-incorporated holding company trading on NASDAQ under 'SATS'. Through subsidiaries including DISH Network and DISH DBS, it provides Pay-TV, broadband, and wireless services. It operates a 5G wireless network, holds FCC spectrum licenses, and offers satellite-based services. The company is pursuing asset sales to AT&T and SpaceX amid FCC regulatory pressure regarding spectrum utilization.

products.name: Pay-TV Service
products.description: Satellite-based pay television service offered through DISH Network to subscribers.

products.name: Wireless Service
products.description: Facilities-based wireless service utilizing T-Mobile and AT&T networks under MNSA and NSA agreements.

products.name: 5G Network
products.description: EchoStar-built 5G broadband network using FCC-licensed spectrum, partially being decommissioned.

products.name: Broadband Service
products.description: Broadband internet service offered to subscribers as part of its communications portfolio.

products.name: Mobile-Satellite Service (MSS)
products.description: Satellite communication service utilizing 2 GHz band spectrum licenses.

partnerships.description: Provides network services to EchoStar wireless subscribers under the MNSA agreement.
Provides network services under NSA agreement; also party to spectrum license purchase transaction (AT&T Transactions).
Party to SpaceX Transactions involving sale of spectrum licenses for cash and equity consideration.

origin.chain: SEC.gov PEM → origin.rootz.global extraction → GitHub mirror
